creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Tue, May 29, 2001 at 11:10:11PM +0200, tobez@tobez.org wrote:

> >Synopsis:       New port: databases/p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder (Perl extension for easy SQL SELECT Statement generation)

> XPORTNAME=	DBIx-SearchBuilder
> XPORTVERSION=	0.15

I don't know how I missed that, but the current version is 0.34 and not
0.15.   Doh!

New shar is here, it just replaces the old one:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/Makefile
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-comment
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/distinfo
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-descr
#	p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-plist
#
echo c - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder
mkdir -p p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	databases/p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder
X# Date created:				01 June 2001
X# Whom:					Anton Berezin <tobez@tobez.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	DBIx-SearchBuilder
XPORTVERSION=	0.34
XCATEGORIES=	databases perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	DBIx
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	tobez@tobez.org
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}/${PERL_ARCH}/DBI.pm:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBI
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=	DBIx::SearchBuilder.3 DBIx::SearchBuilder::Handle.3 \
X	DBIx::SearchBuilder::Handle::Oracle.3 \
X	DBIx::SearchBuilder::Handle::mysql.3 DBIx::SearchBuilder::Record.3
X
XMANPREFIX=	${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/${PERL_VERSION}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/Makefile
echo x - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-comment << 'END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-comment'
XPerl extension for easy SQL SELECT Statement generation
END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-comment
echo x - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/distinfo'
XMD5 (DBIx-SearchBuilder-0.34.tar.gz) = 99715ec20b1cd9be3f2afb396c61aceb
END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/distinfo
echo x - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-descr'
XPerl extension for easy SQL SELECT Statement generation.
X
X-Anton
X<tobez@tobez.org>
END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-descr
echo x - p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-plist'
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx/SearchBuilder/.packlist
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Handle.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Record.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Record/Cachable.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Handle/Pg.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Handle/mysql.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Handle/Oracle.pm
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx/SearchBuilder
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Record
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder/Handle
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx/SearchBuilder
X@unexec rmdir %D/lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx 2>/dev/null || true
X@unexec rmdir %D/lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/DBIx 2>/dev/null || true
END-of-p5-DBIx-SearchBuilder/pkg-plist
exit
